top_signals.title: Insight Investment Is Lured by 6% Yields Into Battered UK Bonds
top_signals.summary: Insight Investment is the latest asset manager to take a punt on long term UK bonds after this year’s selloff, betting that the highest yields in the developed world will be enough to make up for the risks.

top_signals.title: Cameco pays $83M to boost Cigar Lake ownership
top_signals.summary: Upon closing, Cameco's ownership of the mine will rise to 57.418%.

top_signals.title: Apollo’s Floating Wind Quick Connector Gets Closer to Commercial Rollout
top_signals.summary: Apollo has received an Approval in Principle (Level 2) from Bureau Veritas for its PALM Quick Connection System (QCS), a technology designed to simplify the connection and disconnection of dynamic cables from floating offshore wind turbines.The…
